title:
Lesson 1:
Reactions & What Happened
description: '¿En serio?' = Really? / Seriously? '¿Qué pasó?' = What happened? '¿Estás bromeando?' = Are you joking? These are common reactions when hearing surprising news.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Listen, they offered me the job.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Sí, pero también hubo un problema.
dialogue.english: Yes, but there was also a problem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: El sueldo es la mitad de lo que esperaba.
dialogue.english: The salary is half of what I expected.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Are you joking? That can't be!

title:
Lesson 2:
What Are You Doing / Saying
description: '¿Qué haces?' = What do you do? / What are you doing? '¿Qué estás haciendo?' = What are you doing right now? (more emphatic). '¿Qué dijiste?' = What did you say?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Dijiste algo raro hace un momento.
dialogue.english: You said something weird a moment ago.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: What did you say I said?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What do you normally do on Sundays?

vocabulary.english: what are you doing? / what do you do?

title:
Lesson 3:
Which / How Are You / Since When
description: '¿Cuál?' = Which one? '¿Cuál te gusta?' = Which one do you like? '¿Cómo estás?' = How are you? '¿Cómo has estado?' = How have you been? '¿Desde cuándo?' = Since when?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Good, thanks. And you? How have you been?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Muy bien. Tengo un carro nuevo.
dialogue.english: Very well. I have a new car.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Since when do you have a car?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Desde el mes pasado. ¿Cuál prefieres, rojo o azul?
dialogue.english: Since last month. Which do you prefer, red or blue?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Which one do you like more?
